title: Permanent wrap text on the "Main Table"

posts.author: gabem (Gabe)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

I love the wrap text feature but unfortunately right now it cannot be used permanently in the “Main Table” on a board.
Right now Wrap Text can be used permanently in new views that you create but when you use the Wrap Text feature on the Main Table, it does not affect everyone’s view of it and it will reset once you click off of it.
My team and I want to use Wrap Text on the Main Table and not need to create an exact copy of the Main Table just to use Wrap Text on it.

What are you trying to achieve

I would like wrap text to be a permanent option to use in the Main Table View

posts.author: talongi (Thomas P. Alongi)
posts.cookedHtml:
I could not agree more. In fact, I wish MDC would not even confine wrapping to three lines, although that is surely better than one.

Thanks for speaking up, Gabe!

posts.author: JAMatIHDA (Jeffery Moore)
posts.cookedHtml:
Yes! Yes! Yes! A thousand times, Yes!

Please let us set the column default as Wrap Text!
